Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 122 

INVSTGTNL_DVC_AMT 

LABEL: Medical/Surgical Supplies Investigational Device Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the medical/surgical investigational devices supplies 
related to the beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: INVSTGTNL_DVC_AMT 

LONG NAME: INVSTGTNL_DVC_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is
